whatsapp_message:
Hello DHAD Hackers! 
 I am looking to enroll in one of your ready-made learning tracks. Could you please share more information regarding the available schedules and next steps?

Hero.label: From computer basics to mastering programming and cybersecurity
Hero.description: We have the right training for you, whether you want to learn Excel and Word, build websites and software, or even master ethical hacking.

Form.system_ready: Enter your name and phone number to join our roadmap and become part of DHADHackers. We will contact you shortly via the provided number.

Road.description: Master programming, design, or cybersecurity. Follow a clear and practical path with step-by-step guidance.

Fab.cta_text: Ready to start your journey? Register with us now and build your future in the tech field.
Fab.title_1: Learn the skills in demand right now
Fab.description1: Master the exact skills and tools highly requested by companies today, allowing you to easily secure your place in the job market.
Fab.title_2: Choose the time and place that suit you
Fab.description2: Your life is important. We give you the freedom to choose your exact learning time and location, whether at home or at our center.
Fab.title_3: A complete platform for the best learning
Fab.description3: We offer an integrated tech environment with practical application and personal mentoring. Join our community to win side by side.
Fab.title_4: Years of experience to shorten your path
Fab.description4: We don't just teach theory; we share our expertise and years of practical field experience, so you can become a true professional.

Modality.description: We offer multiple learning methods and flexible hours designed to fit your routine. Choose the setting and time that help you focus, learn, and succeed.
Modality.online_desc: Join interactive virtual classrooms live from anywhere.
Modality.home_desc: Get private, 1-on-1 direct training from your own space.
Modality.onsite_desc: Learn in a professional technical environment right in the city of Oujda.

items.question: What are the specialties taught at DHAD Hackers?
items.answer: We focus on high-demand fields in the market like web development (Laravel, React) and cybersecurity (ethical hacking and securing), in addition to training in computer basics and design.

items.question: Will the classes be in-person or online?
items.answer: We give you the freedom to choose! You can attend in person at our center and benefit from direct mentoring, or study online from home at the pace that suits you.

items.question: Does the training include only theory or practical work too?
items.answer: Our entire focus is on practical application. You will work on real projects and participate in technical challenges so that when you finish the training, you are ready for the job market or freelance work.

items.question: Do you help students with their graduation projects (PFE)?
items.answer: Absolutely! We provide special mentoring for students to succeed in their graduation projects, and we teach them to work with professional programming standards and secure infrastructure that companies are looking for today.

items.question: Do I need prior experience in IT to register?
items.answer: Not necessarily! We have special tracks for beginners to start from scratch, and advanced tracks for people who already have the basics and want to specialize more in cybersecurity, DevOps, or programming.

items.question: Do you provide a certificate when I finish the training?
items.answer: Currently, we don't provide certificates, as our main goal is for you to acquire real skills and build a strong portfolio full of projects that convinces companies more than any piece of paper. However, we are working to provide certificates in the near future.

items.question: If I get stuck on a code or project, is there someone to help me?
items.answer: You will never be alone! Once you register, you will join the DHAD Hackers community. You will find mentors and developers with you who will answer your questions and guide you step by step.

items.question: Do I need a high-spec computer (PC) to study with you?
items.answer: For most trainings like web development, a regular computer is more than enough. As for advanced specialties, we show you how to work with lightweight tools or use cloud platforms so you don't overwhelm your PC.

CTA.description: The tech landscape evolves every single day. Secure your spot in our upcoming cohort and start building the skills that will define your career.
